title: cirsium × aschersonii
intro: Cirsium × aschersonii, also known as Ascherson's thistle, is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between Cirsium arvense and Cirsium vulgare. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its silymarin and flavonoid content, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cirsium × aschersonii include its potential to support liver health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Cirsium × aschersonii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, although its usage and preparations may vary depending on regional traditions and cultural practices.
